parts.text: Hello! What is your role as the Lore-seeker and how can you help me build my wiki?

I want to create a new character named 'Alastair the Red', a human wizard who is 90 years old, born in era year 1200, currently active, and lives in Oakhaven Town. Please generate a draft note following the Character schema.
If a character was born in the year 1250 and recorded as deceased, but their death year is listed as 1240, what kind of logical conflict is that?
Generate a new Location note draft for a tavern named 'The Sleeping Dragon' situated in the Great Oak Forest region.
Can you check the database using your tools and tell me what existing facts we have recorded about 'Oakhaven Town'?
